name: Teach People How Educational Services
description_short: Teach People How Educational Services offers credit repair services in Houston, Texas starting at $39.99/month, using FICO score monitoring to dispute negative items on credit reports.
description_long:
Teach People How Educational Services, LLC is a credit repair company operating under the domain teachpeoplehow.com, serving consumers in Houston, Texas and potentially beyond. The company positions itself as an affordable entry point into credit repair services, emphasizing accessibility with a $39.99 monthly price point. Their service model centers on disputing errors and negative items on credit reports, which is the core function of credit repair businesses.

The company's primary offering is credit repair paired with FICO score monitoring. They provide clients with access to full credit reports and emphasize the use of FICO scores specifically, noting that FICO scores are used by 90% of lenders and are superior to alternative scoring models like Vantage scores for predicting loan payment risk. Clients receive 24/7 access to a secure portal for account management. The company sets expectations that credit repair typically takes 4-6 months for profiles with an average amount of negative information to show results.

Teach People How distinguishes itself through an educational approach (reflected in their company name) and their specific emphasis on FICO score monitoring rather than generic credit monitoring. They provide consumer education about why FICO scores matter and how credit repair functions, using an analogy to gardening to set realistic expectations about the time required. Their pricing structure at $39.99/month positions them as a budget-friendly alternative compared to many competitors in the credit repair space.

A significant limitation is the minimal publicly available information about the company. The website lacks an About page (404 error), making it difficult to verify company background, founding date, regulatory compliance, credentials, or team qualifications. The website contains no information about specific dispute processes, success rates, consumer reviews, accreditations, or how they differentiate their dispute methodology from competitors. Without more detailed information, consumers cannot fully assess their legitimacy, track record, or competitive advantages.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Low monthly price point of $39.99 makes credit repair accessible to budget-conscious consumers
Uses FICO score monitoring exclusively, which is the scoring model used by 90% of lenders
24/7 secure portal access allows clients to monitor their credit repair progress anytime
Sets realistic expectations by explaining credit repair typically takes 4-6 months for average cases
Provides full credit report access to clients to review their credit history
Educational focus helps consumers understand why FICO scores matter and how credit repair works
cons: Extremely limited public information—missing About page and no company background details verifiable online
No published success rates, customer reviews, or case studies to evaluate effectiveness
No information about specific dispute processes, credentials, or how they differentiate from competitors
No mention of regulatory compliance, licensing, or industry certifications (NACAS, IAPDA, etc.)
Website lacks details about dispute timelines, guarantee policies, or refund conditions
best_for: Budget-conscious consumers with limited negative items on their credit report
Houston-area residents seeking affordable credit repair services
Consumers willing to wait 4-6 months for credit repair results and monitoring progress
diagnosis: Teach People How may appeal to budget-conscious consumers in Houston seeking affordable credit repair, but the almost complete absence of company background, credentials, success data, or detailed service information on their website makes it impossible to fully assess their legitimacy or track record. Prospective clients should independently verify their licensing, certifications, and reviews before enrolling.
services: Credit repair with dispute filing services
Full credit report access and review
Secure online portal for 24/7 account management
Monthly credit repair service packages starting at $39.99
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
